Meet

The Story
Behind the Lens

Asit Verma

Founder & Lead Photographer

Photography has always been more than a passion — it is a lifelong calling. When I moved to Alberta, I made the decision to turn that calling into something meaningful, building a boutique studio from the ground up with one guiding principle: create imagery that endures.

I trained at Alberta Film School, refining my eye for visual storytelling and cinematic composition. After graduating, I worked across weddings, headshots, and creative portrait sessions — growing with every shutter click. In 2025, I proudly launched A Vision Arts Photography.

“Turning moments into lasting memories.”
Begin Your Journey

What We Offer

Our Services

Book Now
01

Portrait Sessions

Individual and family portraits crafted with natural light and careful direction. An experience as beautiful as the images we create together.

02

Wedding Photography

Complete wedding coverage — from intimate vows to grand celebrations. Every emotion of your most sacred day, captured with artistry.

03

Pre-Wedding Shoots

Romantic and artful couples sessions at locations that frame your love story. A beautiful prelude to your wedding day.

04

Maternity & Newborn

Tender, luminous sessions celebrating new life. We create heirlooms of the most precious chapter of your family’s story.

05

Corporate & Headshots

Professional imagery communicating confidence and authenticity. Perfect for LinkedIn, websites, and press materials.

06

Product & Commercial

Studio and lifestyle product photography designed to elevate your brand and captivate your customers with every image.
